title: journald logs: keep reading until the journal's end
body:
#### What this PR does / why we need it:

When reading logs from the journal, keep going after the container exits, in case it gets restarted.

Events logged to the journal via the normal paths don't include CONTAINER_ID_FULL, so don't bother adding it to the "history" event we use to force at least one entry for the container to show up in the log.

#### How to verify it

New integration test!

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

Fixes #12263.

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

comments.body:

/approve

The OpenShift release test failure looks unrelated
